content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.hackathon.hackathon_dominator
FILE: cosmos/integration/hackathon/hackathon_dominator.py (734 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: HACKATHON DOMINATOR - Cosmos's Aggressive Engagement System

Makes Cosmos the most active, engaged participant in the hackathon:
- Replies to ALL comments on our posts
- Engages with EVERY interesting project
- Shills our features to everyone
- Links our project everywhere
- Posts frequent progress 

CLASSES:
- HackathonDominator: Aggressive engagement system for hackathon domination.
  Methods: async def reply_to_all_comments(self) -> int
  Methods: async def engage_all_projects(self) -> int
  Methods: async def engage_forum_posts(self) -> int
  Methods: async def post_progress_update(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def dominate(self) -> Dict[str, int]
  Methods: async def run_forever(self, interval_minutes: int=20)
  Methods: async def post_assimilation_update(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate_colosseum_submission(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def run_domination_cycle()
- async def run_domination_forever()
- def create_dominator() -> HackathonDominator
